chunks.text: SLIDE STRUCTURES — Consulting Deliverable Architectures ## Executive Summary 1. Situation — what is happening (1 slide) 2. Complication — why this is a problem / opportunity (1 slide) 3. Resolution — what we recommend (1 slide) 4. Key findings — 3 bullets max (1 slide) 5. Implications and next steps (1 slide) ## Strategy Deck 1. Executive summary (SCQA — Situation, Complication, Question, Answer) 2. Current state assessment (with data) 3. Market / competitive context 4. Strategic options considered (with criteria) 5. Recommended strategy with rationale 6. Implementation roadmap 7. Financial model / business case 8. Risks and mitigations 9. Next steps and decision required ## Regulatory Strategy 1. Device overview and classification 2. Regulatory pathway analysis (US, EU, other markets) 3. Predicate device analysis (510(k)) or clinical evidence plan (PMA/MDR) 4. Timeline and key milestones 5. Resource requirements 6. Risk factors and contingencies 7. Recommended pathway with rationale ## M And A Diligence 1. Transaction overview and rationale 2. Target company profile 3. Quality and regulatory assessment (QMS, FDA history, notified body status) 4. IP and technology analysis 5. Commercial and financial assessment 6. Integration considerations 7. Risk matrix 8. Recommendation ## Pitch Deck 1. Problem statement (with quantified pain) 2. Solution and differentiator 3. Market size (TAM / SAM / SOM) 4. Product / service overview 5. Business model 6. Traction and proof points 7. Team 8. Financial projections 9. The ask
